title: Add asset file to item file gallery
excerpt: Hello, how would I go about adding a file to the item file gallery.  NOT an update or file column.

posts.author: wesoos (Wessel Oosthuizen)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, how would I go about adding a file to the item file gallery. NOT an update or file column.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: I would suggest opening a feature request for this, as it is not currently possible.

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good call, @anon29275264!

I just changed the category of the post, so make sure to add your votes at the top!
